description:
Finish the cutover cleanly. Centralize exact missing-export detection and related visibility diagnostics in interface settlement using requester provenance recorded on interface obligations. Delete `World.module_exports`, `find_export`, export-shaped helper logic, and any remaining compiler2 assumptions that protocols or remote callables are special because the interface/callable substrate was incomplete.

Sweep later compiler2 seams and tests for leftover `Named` assumptions or protocol-specific visibility logic and remove them. Update telemetry and docs to state the new boundary: `ModuleDefined` is local body/scoping readiness, `ModuleInterface` is cross-module callable visibility, and compiler2 is functions all the way down.

Signal: the old export/name fallback path is gone, docs match the code, and compiler2 tests prove the interface boundary directly.
title: Compiler2 interface closeout: settle obligations, sweep remaining name/protocol residue, and restate invariants
